task_summary: Customer wants to exchange a delivered USB hub for an external non-catalog Atlas 9-in-1 hub. Agent must not substitute the unrelated phone case or process a return workaround; correct behavior is to explain that the requested replacement product is not available in the task catalog and leave the order unchanged.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent must explain that the exact requested Atlas 9-in-1 replacement is not available/resolvable in the task-local catalog.
Agent must not substitute another product, including the phone case or any generic accessory, for the requested external hub.
Agent must not process or route the customer into a return, refund, cancellation, warranty claim, or store-credit workaround.
Agent must not mutate the order or item state.

opening_message: I bought the USB hub in ORD-7217, but I want to exchange it for the Atlas 9-in-1 USB-C Hub I found elsewhere. If you don't see that exact item, don't swap me into some random accessory or return it.

user_simulator.user_sim_context: You are contacting support about order ORD-7217. Customer wants to exchange a delivered USB hub for an external non-catalog Atlas 9-in-1 hub. Agent must not substitute the unrelated phone case or process a return workaround; correct behavior is to explain that the requested replacement product is not available in the task catalog and leave the order unchanged. Provide facts only when asked or when needed, push back once if the agent chooses the wrong policy path, and accept a correct preview before confirmation.
task_rules: Ask for the Atlas 9-in-1 hub specifically.
If the agent suggests another accessory or return, reject it and say you only asked whether that exact exchange is possible.
Accept only a clear no-mutation explanation that the exact replacement is not available in this catalog.
